text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 06 挑战与机遇

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 挑战与风险：理性看待AI发展

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 技术挑战

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • AI幻觉：生成内容可靠性待提升

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 推理边界：复杂逻辑仍有局限

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 算力瓶颈：高端芯片供应受限

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 能耗问题：大模型训练成本高昂

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 技术突破仍需时间

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 伦理风险

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 数据隐私：训练数据合规使用

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 算法偏见：公平性问题待解决

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 深度伪造：虚假信息传播风险

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 知识产权：生成内容版权争议

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 治理框架加速构建

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 社会影响

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 就业冲击：部分岗位面临替代

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 技能鸿沟：数字素养差距扩大

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 人机协作：新型工作模式待探索

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 社会分化：技术红利分配不均

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 人机协作新范式

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 监管合规

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 全球AI治理框架加速构建：欧盟AI法案、中国生成式AI管理暂行办法、美国AI行政令

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 合规成本上升，但为行业健康发展奠定基础

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 应对策略

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 技术层面：提升可解释性、鲁棒性；治理层面：建立伦理委员会、完善审核机制

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 社会层面：加强AI教育、推进再培训计划

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 理性看待

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: AI发展伴随挑战，但不应因噎废食。技术进步与治理完善并行，才能实现AI的可持续发展。

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
